name: Fast or Dead
short_description: Welcome to the dark world of «Fast or Dead VR» game, arcade auto-simulator + shooter. You'll find an upgrade and customization system, angry zombie pedestrians and surviving car owners, and much more!
detailed_description:
Welcome to the dark world of «Fast or Dead VR» solo-developed game!
Humanity is dying out after a global epidemic. Most of the infected have turned into zombies or mutated. Scattered communities of survivors are preoccupied with two things: survival and plunder.
You are a free mercenary, plowing the wasteland in your four-wheeled wreck. Use any opportunity to earn extra money.
And remember - any means are good for survival!
You'll find an upgrade and customization system, angry zombie pedestrians and surviving car owners, and much more!

Virtual reality (VR) helmets are supported.
